name: nelumbo nucifera
mechanism: used in ayurveda and buddhist practices for calm and devotion
safetyNotes: Moderate risk: side effects or medication interactions are plausible. Avoid use during pregnancy unless advised by a clinician; Avoid combining with sedatives, alcohol, or other CNS depressants.
